title: Check Redis Databases on Mittwald
description: Check Redis databases on Mittwald hosting.
prompt: I want to check if I have any Redis databases on my Mittwald project. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to list my projects and show all Redis databases.

Our WordPress site is getting slow with traffic. I want to add Redis caching to speed it up. Can you set up a Redis database for our project and show me the connection details so I can configure the cache plugin? Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
